source_description: Synthetic — represents v0.8.1 -> v0.8.2 upgrade state where the yaml->toml migration ran once but hasn't completed its full re-serialization pass. config.toml has the [default] block from migration. config.yaml still exists (engine hasn't removed it). jobs.json still uses Desktop-app 'schedule' alias. One session is v0 schema (no schema_version field) — the migration ladder must stamp it v1 on first load.

uuid_map.00000000-0003-4000-8000-000000000003: original was UUID v4 (cron job id)

scenarios_that_replay_this: T6: config resolution prefers [default] toml block over yaml model when both exist
T6: cron list deserializes 'schedule' alias to 'expression' field correctly
T6: session loader runs v0->v1 migration ladder and stamps schema_version=1
T6: --list-sessions shows the v0 session after migration (not silently dropped)
